title: Rispwind's Survival Spawn Eggs
description: Wandering Traders will occasionally sell spawn eggs.
body:
Have you ever wanted to obtain spawn eggs in survival, but find crafting recipes to be a bit too unrealistic? Well, I have a solution for you!

With this mod, Wandering Traders will have a chance to sell spawn eggs.

Different eggs will cost varying amounts of emeralds based on the rarity of the mob (and how easy they are to transport).


The core four mob spawn eggs (Pigs, Chickens, Cows, and Sheep) are the cheapest. From there eggs become more expensive. Villager spawn eggs, in particular, are the most expensive.


NOTE: Wither and Ender-Dragon Spawn Eggs are NOT included in trades.
